message.content:
@startuml
actor SalesClerk

participant ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI
participant ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController
participant ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService
participant OrderRepository
participant ChangeToBeingDeliveredService

SalesClerk -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 1 Update the status of dispatched orders to "Being delivered" for customer delivery.
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 2 orderDispatched()
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController -> ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService : 3 orderDispatched()
ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService -> OrderRepository : 4 orderDispatched()
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI <-- OrderRepository : 5 ordersDispatched
SalesClerk <-- ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 6 Shows all the orders that are dispatched.
SalesClerk <-- ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 7 Asks to choose one of the orders
SalesClerk -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 8 Selects the order he wants to change status
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI -> ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 9 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController -> ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService : 10 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService -> ChangeToBeingDeliveredService : 11 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI <-- ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController : 12 Successful change
SalesClerk <-- ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI : 13 Informs that is changed
@enduml
